presentation.description: I specialize in building fast, accessible and visually refined web experiences. I primarily work with React, Vite and modern REST APIs, adapting to whatever stack each project calls for.

experience1.description: Development of an automated booking and payment system via WhatsApp for the barbershop 'El Bigote Siberiano', storing data in Google services such as Sheets and Calendar. Project paused during the Mercado Pago API integration phase at the client's request.
achievements: Designed and developed an end-to-end booking ecosystem integrating the WhatsApp Business API, Make and Google Workspace, automating the scheduling flow and reducing the administrative workload of the business
Built a natural language processing engine in TypeScript to normalize dates and times to ISO 8601 format
Improved booking success rate by migrating from an unstable generative AI model to a deterministic logic flow system, eliminating interpretation errors and ensuring accurate data capture

experience2.description: Development of an e-commerce platform with an internal management system and technical service quoting. Contributed primarily as Backend Developer, designing the REST API and relational database architecture.
achievements: Designed and implemented a REST API using Node.js, Express and MySQL with Sequelize ORM, structuring models, relationships and validations for products, services, quotes and orders
Built a file upload and management system with Multer, including type and size validations, storing payment proofs and documents directly on the server
Integrated a notification system with transactional email delivery via Resend, covering quote and order lifecycle events for both clients and administrators

about1.title: Who I am
about1.description: Originally from La Rioja, Argentina — a technology enthusiast since childhood, venturing into computing and later into programming with the dream of one day creating video games.

about2.title: My experience
about2.description: Full Stack Developer focused on building REST APIs and functional, intuitive web experiences. I have contributed to real collaborative projects across different technical contexts — from relational database design to third-party service integration — always aiming for clean and scalable solutions.

items.title: Technician in Electromechanical Equipment Repair and Installation

project1.role: Full Stack Developer - Grocery Store Management System
project1.description: Developed my university capstone project: a comprehensive web application for grocery store management, featuring inventory and supplier tracking, and a point-of-sale system with automated receipt generation.
achievements: Implemented a secure login system with Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to manage user permissions and actions.
Engineered an efficient backend using Node.js and MySQL, integrated with an intuitive and modern React frontend.
Focused on security best practices and the robust handling of sensitive data.

project2.description: Developed a mobile Pokedex application powered by the PokeApi, enabling users to search and explore detailed characteristics for every Pokemon.
achievements: Architected a robust integration with the PokeApi RESTful service, effectively managing complex loading states and error handling.
Designed a clean, optimized mobile interface focused on delivering a seamless and high-quality user experience.
Implemented real-time data filtering and normalization logic to ensure efficient data rendering.
